params.body: {"model":"gemma3:4b","prompt":"Explain security playbooks and agent experience reuse in 3 sentences","stream":false,"options":{"num_predict":80}}

params.prompt: Explain security playbooks and agent experience reuse in 3 sentences.

output: Security playbooks are pre-defined, step-by-step procedures for responding to specific security incidents, streamlining investigations and ensuring consistent actions across teams. Agent experience reuse focuses on leveraging existing, tested security tools and workflows – like those defined in a playbook – across multiple incident types to reduce duplication and improve efficiency. Ultimately, this combination of playbooks and reusable agent experiences dramatically accelerates response times and strengthens overall security posture.

token:
Security playbooks은 특정 보안 사고에 대한 사전 정의된 단계별 절차이며, 일관된 대응을 가능하게 합니다.  
Agent experience reuse는 이미 검증된

도구와 워크플로우(예: Playbook)를 여러 사건 유형에 재활용해 중복 작업을 줄이고 효율성을 높이는 방식입니다.  
두 개념이 결합되면 사고 대응 속도가 크게 빨라지고 전반
